nativeLanguageHint: Used as the default language when translating a transcript.
appLanguageHint: The language the interface is shown in (where a translation is available).
googleNotConnected: Not connected. Sign in with Google to link your account.
googleDataHint: Tick what to allow, then Connect to grant access at Google. Used to match recordings to your calendar meetings.
googleConnectError: Could not start the Google connection.
mcpIntro: Generate a token to connect Claude to your transcripts. Add the URL and token to Claude's MCP config; the token is shown only once.
mcpTokenOnce: Copy this token now — you won't be able to see it again.
aiIntro: Your own OpenAI-compatible endpoint, used for both summaries and chat. Leave fields blank to use the server default.
keyWillClear: The stored key will be cleared on save.
chatContextHint: Drives the chat context dial. Leave blank to use the server default.
chatToolsHint: Let the chat model call built-in tools that search your transcripts. Requires a model that supports tool calling.
reasoningHint: Ask reasoning-capable models to think before answering (sends reasoning_effort). Leave off for models that don't support it.
quotasIntro: New users start with the starter quota; administrators can raise a user up to the maximum.
backupDescription: Download the entire platform — the database and all stored files — as a single archive you can keep or move to another machine.
backupSensitive: The backup contains all platform data (including password hashes and every recording). Store it securely.
restoreDescription: Replace this platform's data with the contents of a backup archive. Only a backup from this app version can be restored.
restoreDanger: This permanently replaces ALL data — every user, recording and setting. The app is briefly unavailable and you will be signed out.
restoreConfirm: I understand this will permanently replace all current data.
